content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:StarWarsHS.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]'' broadcast in November 1978 on CBS-TV.]]

A list of events in '''1978''' related to ''[[Star Wars]]''.

==January==
*[[January 10|10]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 10|''Star Wars'' (1977) 10]] published. The cover date is April.
*?? – ''[[Contemporary Motivators: Star Wars]]'' published.
*?? – [[Pizzazz 4|''Pizzazz'' 4]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 4|''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 4]] published.

==February==
*[[February 7|7]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 11|''Star Wars'' (1977) 11]] published. The cover date is May.
*[[February 8|8]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 1|''Star Wars Weekly'' 1]] published.
*[[February 12|12]] – ''[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye]]'' published.
*[[February 15|15]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 2|''Star Wars Weekly'' 2]] published.
*[[February 21|21]] – [[Kumail Nanjiani]] is born.
*[[February 22|22]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 3|''Star Wars Weekly'' 3]] published.
*?? – [[Pizzazz 5|''Pizzazz'' 5]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 5|''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 5]] published.

==March==
*[[March 1|1]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 4|''Star Wars Weekly'' 4]] published.
*[[March 8|8]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 5|''Star Wars Weekly'' 5]] published.
*[[March 7|7]] – [[Ben Templesmith]] is born.
*[[March 14|14]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 12|''Star Wars'' (1977) 12]] published. The cover date is June.
*[[March 15|15]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 6|''Star Wars Weekly'' 6]] published.
*[[March 18|18]] – [[Leigh Brackett]] dies.
*[[March 22|22]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 7|''Star Wars Weekly'' 7]] published.
*[[March 29|29]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 8|''Star Wars Weekly'' 8]] published.
*[[March 31|31]] – [[Daniel Mays]] is born.
*?? – [[Pizzazz 6|''Pizzazz'' 6]] published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 6]] ''published.

==April==
*[[April 3|3]] – [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] wins six of its ten Academy Award nominations, including Best Visual Effects, Best Original Score, and Best Film Editing at the 50th Academy Awards.
*[[April 5|5]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 9|''Star Wars Weekly'' 9]] published.
*[[April 11|11]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 13|''Star Wars'' (1977) 13]] published. The cover date is July.
*[[April 12|12]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 10|''Star Wars Weekly'' 10]] published.
*12 – ''[[The Star Wars Storybook]]'' published.
*[[April 19|19]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 11|''Star Wars Weekly'' 11]] published.
*[[April 20|20]] – [[Eric Lopez]] is born.
*[[April 26|26]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 12|''Star Wars Weekly'' 12]] published.
*?? – [[Pizzazz 7|''Pizzazz'' 7]] published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 7]] ''published.

==May==
*[[May 3|3]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 13|''Star Wars Weekly'' 13]] published.
*[[May 9|9]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 14|''Star Wars'' (1977) 14]] published. The cover date is August.
*[[May 10|10]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 14|''Star Wars Weekly'' 14]] published.
*[[May 12|12]] – [[Anna Graves]] is born.
*[[May 17|17]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 15|''Star Wars Weekly'' 15]] published.
*[[May 24|24]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 16|''Star Wars Weekly'' 16]] published.
*[[May 27|27]] – [[Michonne Bourriague]] is born.
*[[May 31|31]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 17|''Star Wars Weekly'' 17]] published.
*?? – [[Pizzazz 8|''Pizzazz'' 8]] published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 8]] ''published.

==June==
*[[June 7|7]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 18|''Star Wars Weekly'' 18]] published.
*7 – [[Bill Hader]] is born.
*[[June 14|14]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 19|''Star Wars Weekly'' 19]] published.
*[[June 21|21]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 20|''Star Wars Weekly'' 20]] published.
*[[June 22|22]] – [[Wayne Nichols]] is born.
*[[June 24|24]] – [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'']] released in Japan under its US title.
*[[June 27|27]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 15|''Star Wars'' (1977) 15]] published. The cover date is September.
*[[June 28|28]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 21|''Star Wars Weekly'' 21]] published.
*?? – [[Pizzazz 9|''Pizzazz'' 9]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 9|''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 9]] published.

==July==
*[[July 5|5]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 22|''Star Wars Weekly'' 22]] published.
*[[July 12|12]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 23|''Star Wars Weekly'' 23]] published.
*[[July 14|14]] – [[Kristy Wright]] is born.
*[[July 19|19]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 24|''Star Wars Weekly'' 24]] published.
*[[July 21|21]] – [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] (re-issue)
*[[July 24|24]] – [[Gabe Eltaeb]] is born.
*[[July 25|25]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 16|''Star Wars'' (1977) 16]] published. The cover date is October.
*[[July 26|26]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 25|''Star Wars Weekly'' 25]] published.
*?? – [[Pizzazz 10|''Pizzazz'' 10]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 10|''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 10]] published.

==August==
*[[August 1|1]] – [[Dhani Harrison]] is born.
*[[August 2|2]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 26|''Star Wars Weekly'' 26]] published.
*[[August 9|9]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 27|''Star Wars Weekly'' 27]] published.
*[[August 14|14]] – [[Misty Rosas]] is born.
*[[August 15|15]] – [[David Nakayama]] is born.
*[[August 16|16]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 28|''Star Wars Weekly'' 28]] published.
*[[August 18|18]] – [[Trey King]] is born.
*[[August 22|22]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 17|''Star Wars'' (1977) 17]] published. The cover date is November.
*[[August 23|23]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 29|''Star Wars Weekly'' 29]] published.
*[[August 30|30]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 30|''Star Wars Weekly'' 30]] published.
*?? – [[Pizzazz 11|''Pizzazz'' 11]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 11|''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 11]] published.

==September==
*[[September 6|6]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 31|''Star Wars Weekly'' 31]] published.
*[[September 13|13]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 32|''Star Wars Weekly'' 32]] published.
*[[September 20|20]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 33|''Star Wars Weekly'' 33]] published.
*[[September 24|24]] – [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] makes his first public appearance, marching alongside [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] in the San Anselmo Country Fair parade.
*[[September 26|26]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 18|''Star Wars'' (1977) 18]] published. The cover date is December.
*[[September 27|27]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 34|''Star Wars Weekly'' 34]] published.
*?? – [[Pizzazz 12|''Pizzazz'' 12]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 12|''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 12]] published.

==October==
*[[October 4|4]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 35|''Star Wars Weekly'' 35]] published.
*[[October 11|11]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 36|''Star Wars Weekly'' 36]] published.
*[[October 18|18]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 37|''Star Wars Weekly'' 37]] published.
*[[October 24|24]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 19|''Star Wars'' (1977) 19]] published. The cover date is January.
*[[October 25|25]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 38|''Star Wars Weekly'' 38]] published.
*[[October 28|28]] – [[Gwendoline Christie]] is born.
*?? – [[Pizzazz 13|''Pizzazz'' 13]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 13|''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 13]] published.

==November==
*[[November 1|1]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 39|''Star Wars Weekly'' 39]] published.
*[[November 2|2]] – [[Whit Hertford]] is born.
*[[November 6|6]] – [[Nicole Dubuc]] is born.
*[[November 8|8]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 40|''Star Wars Weekly'' 40]] published.
*[[November 15|15]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 41|''Star Wars Weekly'' 41]] published.
*[[November 17|17]] – ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]'' airs on [[CBS]] from 8:00 to 10:00 p.m. Eastern Standard Time.
*[[November 21|21]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 20|''Star Wars'' (1977) 20]] published. The cover date is February.
*[[November 22|22]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 42|''Star Wars Weekly'' 42]] published.
*[[November 29|29]] – [[Tom Taylor]] is born.
*29 – [[Star Wars Weekly 43|''Star Wars Weekly'' 43]] published.
*[[November 30|30]] – [[Robert Kirkman]] is born.
*?? – [[Pizzazz 14|''Pizzazz'' 14]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 14|''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 14]] published.

==December==
*[[December 1|1]] – [[Xanthe Elbrick]] is born.
*[[December 6|6]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 44|''Star Wars Weekly'' 44]] published.
*[[December 12|12]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 45|''Star Wars Weekly'' 45]] published.
*[[December 19|19]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 21|''Star Wars'' (1977) 21]] published. The cover date is March.
*[[December 20|20]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 46|''Star Wars Weekly'' 46]] published.
*[[December 22|22]] – [[George Mann]] is born.
*[[December 27|27]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 47|''Star Wars Weekly'' 47]] published.
*?? – [[Pizzazz 15|''Pizzazz'' 15]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 15|''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 15]] published.

==Miscellaneous==
*[[Kevin Baillie]] is born.
*[[Marc Sumerak]] is born.
*[[Adam Christopher]] is born.
*[[Marvel Special Edition Featuring Star Wars 3|''Marvel Special Edition Featuring Star Wars'' 3]] published.
*[[Kenner Products|Kenner]] released the first action figures
**[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
**[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]]
**[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]
**[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]
**[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Ben Kenobi]]
**[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]
**[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]
**[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]
**[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]]
**[[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sand People]]
**[[Death Star Trooper/Legends|Death Star trooper]] aka 'Death Squad Commander' / 'Star Destroyer Commander'
**[[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] (later released in 78)
